prompt: Anime style, warm yellow interior lighting, same late-night Chinese noodle shop. Continuing directly from previous scene. CHEN LEI, 30-year-old Chinese man with short black hair, square jaw, white chef shirt and dark blue apron, places a steaming bowl of noodles in front of LIU GE and knocks on the counter to wake him. LIU GE, 45-year-old chubby Chinese man in rumpled grey suit with crooked tie, slowly lifts his head, picks up chopsticks and takes a big bite of noodles. His eyes go wide with shock mid-chew, then his eyes redden with tears as he speaks with a trembling voice. Chen Lei freezes for a moment, then slowly smiles and pats Liu Ge's shoulder gently. Liu Ge continues eating, sniffling but smiling. The shop is quiet and warm. Vertical 9:16 composition. Normal speed movement, natural pacing. No slow motion. No facing camera directly. No subtitles.
